content:
MODULE: cosmos.skills.skill_loader
FILE: cosmos/skills/skill_loader.py (180 lines)
CATEGORY: skills

DESCRIPTION: Cosmos Skill Loader
=======================

Loads and manages skills for the collective.
Compatible with HermesAgent Skill Document format.

CLASSES:
- Skill: A skill definition.
  Methods: def emoji(self) -> str
  Methods: def homepage(self) -> str
- SkillLoader: Loads skills from various sources.

Supports:
- Local SKILL.md files
- GitHub re
  Methods: def load_from_file(self, skill_path: Path) -> Optional[Skill]
  Methods: def load_from_github(self, repo_url: str, skill_name: str) -> Optional[Skill]
  Methods: def get_skill(self, name: str) -> Optional[Skill]
  Methods: def list_skills(self) -> List[str]
  Methods: def get_skill_prompt(self, name: str) -> str

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- def get_skill_loader() -> SkillLoader
- def load_skill(name: str) -> Optional[Skill]
